description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a rugged, boxy chassis with a metallic, weathered texture and prominent, oversized wheels designed for off-road performance. The front end is equipped with a detailed grille, two red-tinted headlights, and a small smiley face decal, adding a touch of personality. The cockpit area is open, with two angular, magenta-tinted windshields and visible red seating, suggesting space for two occupants. The wheels are thick, with a blocky tread pattern and metallic hubcaps, connected to the body by visible pink suspension rods. The rear of the vehicle is reinforced, with a robust bumper and additional detailing that hints at durability and power. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical elements and a color palette dominated by grays, reds, and magentas, making it suitable for urban and off-road environments.
description: A rugged, metallic all-terrain vehicle with oversized blocky wheels, open cockpit, and bold red and magenta accents. Its exposed mechanical details and robust build make it ideal for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, red-tinted headlights, smiley face decal, and angular magenta windshields.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cockpit, red seating, sloped rear, and large blocky wheels with visible suspension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced bumper, rear lights, and the magenta cockpit area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open cockpit, red seating, and detailed wheel structure.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with prominent raised sections, providing excellent grip on rough and uneven surfaces.
